# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  BUILD_SCRIPT: "./scripts/build.sh"
  TEST_SCRIPT: "./scripts/test.sh"
  DEPLOY_SCRIPT: "./scripts/deploy.sh"
  BUILD_IMAGE: "ubuntu:latest"
  CUSTOM_ENV_FILE: ".env.ci"

default:
  tags:
    - shared
  before_script:
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_ENV_FILE" ]; then
        echo "Loading custom environment variables from $CUSTOM_ENV_FILE"
        export $(grep -v '^#' "$CUSTOM_ENV_FILE" | xargs)
      fi
    - |
      if [ -f "./scripts/setup.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom setup script"
        chmod +x ./scripts/setup.sh
        ./scripts/setup.sh
      fi

build:
  stage: build
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "$BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom build script: $BUILD_SCRIPT"
        chmod +x "$BUILD_SCRIPT"
        $BUILD_SCRIPT
      else
        echo "No custom build script found at $BUILD_SCRIPT"
        echo "Checking for common build configurations..."
        if [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
          echo "Found Makefile, running make"
          make build
        elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
          echo "Found package.json, running npm build"
          npm install
          npm run build
        elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
          echo "Found pom.xml, running Maven build"
          mvn package -B
        elif [ -f "build.gradle" ] || [ -f "build.gradle.kts" ]; then
          echo "Found Gradle build file, running Gradle build"
          ./gradlew build
        elif [ -f "requirements.txt" ] || [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
          echo "Found Python project"
          pip install -r requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || true
          python setup.py build 2>/dev/null || true
        elif [ -f "Cargo.toml" ]; then
          echo "Found Cargo.toml, running cargo build"
          cargo build --release
        elif [ -f "go.mod" ]; then
          echo "Found go.mod, running go build"
          go build ./...
        else
          echo "No recognized build system found. Please provide a custom build script at $BUILD_SCRIPT"
          exit 1
        fi
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
      - dist/
      - target/
      - out/
      - bin/
      - node_modules/
    expire_in: 1 week
    when: on_success
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "web"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "schedule"

test:
  stage: test
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "$TEST_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom test script: $TEST_SCRIPT"
        chmod +x "$TEST_SCRIPT"
        $TEST_SCRIPT
      else
        echo "No custom test script found at $TEST_SCRIPT"
        echo "Checking for common test configurations..."
        if [ -f "Makefile" ] && grep -q "test" Makefile; then
          echo "Found Makefile with test target, running make test"
          make test
        elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
          echo "Found package.json, running npm test"
          npm test
        elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
          echo "Found pom.xml, running Maven test"
          mvn test -B
        elif [ -f "build.gradle" ] || [ -f "build.gradle.kts" ]; then
          echo "Found Gradle build file, running Gradle test"
          ./gradlew test
        elif [ -f "requirements.txt" ] || [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
          echo "Found Python project, running pytest"
          pip install pytest 2>/dev/null || true
          pytest || python -m unittest discover
        elif [ -f "Cargo.toml" ]; then
          echo "Found Cargo.toml, running cargo test"
          cargo test
        elif [ -f "go.mod" ]; then
          echo "Found go.mod, running go test"
          go test ./...
        else
          echo "No recognized test framework found. Skipping tests."
          echo "Please provide a custom test script at $TEST_SCRIPT"
        fi
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - test-results/
      - coverage/
      - htmlcov/
    reports:
      junit:
        - test-results/**/*.xml
        - "**/TEST-*.xml"
        - "**/surefire-reports/*.xml"
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: coverage/cobertura-coverage.xml
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: always
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "web"
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "schedule"
  dependencies:
    - build

deploy:staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: $STAGING_URL
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom deploy script: $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        chmod +x "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        DEPLOY_ENV=staging $DEPLOY_SCRIPT
      else
        echo "No custom deploy script found at $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        echo "Please provide a deploy script at $DEPLOY_SCRIPT for staging deployment."
        exit 1
      fi
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: on_success
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"
      when: on_success
  dependencies:
    - build
    - test

deploy:production:
  stage: deploy
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  environment:
    name: production
    url: $PRODUCTION_URL
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom deploy script: $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        chmod +x "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        DEPLOY_ENV=production $DEPLOY_SCRIPT
      else
        echo "No custom deploy script found at $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        echo "Please provide a deploy script at $DEPLOY_SCRIPT for production deployment."
        exit 1
      fi
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG =~ /^v\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/
      when: manual
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: manual
  allow_failure: false
  dependencies:
    - build
    - test
